message:
web: Add special rendering for MCP tool calls

- Add MCPIcon component for MCP server tools
- Detect MCP tools by mcp__server__fn naming pattern
- Render with capitalized server name and function name
- Show JSON syntax-highlighted input
- Render output text as markdown
- Display output images underneath the collapsible

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/ii7wi4kzc6lv1dz82ee4hlj3
